title: Hydrogen bond symmetrisation in D2O ice observed by neutron diffraction

primary_findings.experimental_observation: Transition from bimodal to unimodal deuterium distribution at ~80 GPa
primary_findings.physical_phenomenon: Hydrogen bond symmetrization achieved under pressure
primary_findings.mechanism: Nuclear quantum effects with significant isotope effect

structural_changes.indicator: Significant narrowing of neutron diffraction peaks
